function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0011
alias: helios_followup_support_invoice
issued_on: 2026-03-29
total_eur: 550
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 160
    line_eur: 160
---
# Helios rollout support invoice

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                         |
| invoice_number | INV-0011                        |
| alias          | helios_followup_support_invoice |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-29                      |
| total_eur      | 550                             |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH  |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint          |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                  |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 2 | staff follow-up support            | 1   | 160      | 160      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 550      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A small late-stage invoice for rollout support after the usable version finally landed with staff.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item by adding YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_29__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md using the finance schema, while preserving the original note body verbatim below the frontmatter. Then removed the completed inbox item 00_inbox/000_next-task.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements (tree, root AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS before entering folders, inspected 99_system and relevant workflows, used the finance schema for exact fields, preserved the original note body verbatim under the frontmatter, kept the diff focused, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked for OCR/frontmatter extraction on the specific invoice file. The target note visibly contained all required invoice schema fields defined in 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md: record_type, invoice_number, alias, issued_on, total_eur, counterparty, project, and complete ordered lines, plus optional related_entity. This made the migration fully supportable without guessing, so the invoice file was updated and the inbox item was removed per the inbox-processing workflows.
